'''majana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placeable|placeable]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placeable|placeable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| majana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæjænæth|mæjænæth]] || [[word:mæjænæj|mæjænæj]] || [[word:mæjænæsh|mæjænæsh]] || [[word:mæjænæ|mæjænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:majajanath|majajanath]] || [[word:majajanaj|majajanaj]] || [[word:majajanash|majajanash]] || [[word:majajana|majajana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:majanath|majanath]] || [[word:majanaj|majanaj]] || [[word:majanash|majanash]] || [[word:majana|majana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:majafnath|majafnath]] || [[word:majafnaj|majafnaj]] || [[word:majafnash|majafnash]] || [[word:majafnaf|majafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:majanatha|majanatha]] || [[word:majanaja|majanaja]] || [[word:majanasha|majanasha]] || [[word:majanaka|majanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:majanath|majanath]] || [[word:majanaj|majanaj]] || [[word:majanash|majanash]] || [[word:majana|majana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:majanathal|majanathal]] || [[word:majanajal|majanajal]] || [[word:majanashal|majanashal]] || [[word:majanakal|majanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:majanathatha|majanathatha]] || [[word:majanajaja|majanajaja]] || [[word:majanashasha|majanashasha]] || [[word:majanaka|majanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:majanathan|majanathan]] || [[word:majanajan|majanajan]] || [[word:majanashan|majanashan]] || [[word:majanakan|majanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:majanathaoro|majanathaoro]] || [[word:majanajaoro|majanajaoro]] || [[word:majanashaoro|majanashaoro]] || [[word:majanakaoro|majanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
